anatomy_proportions: Grounded action manga proportions with readable silhouettes.
anatomy_style: Grounded samurai action proportions with readable poses.
architecture_detail: Broken shrine beams, hanging wires, collapsed roofs, and wet stone.
background_density: Detailed ruined landmarks, simplified distant silhouettes.
background_detail: Detailed rubble, shrine fragments, hanging cables, and broken signs.
black_fill_ratio: High contrast, about forty percent deep black on moody panels.
black_white_balance: Large black ruins contrasted with white lantern glow and clean silhouettes.
bubble_style: Clean speech bubbles and rectangular narration boxes.
clothing_fold_style: Angular travel-cloth folds with sparse hatching.
emotional_visual_rules: Lantern light is the only soft glow.
Isolation is shown with negative space.
eye_design_language: Strong eye acting, small highlights, readable emotional restraint.
face_language: Reserved expressions, strong eye acting, small mouth changes.
face_shape_language: Reserved faces with sharp protector angles and soft ghost-child curves.
gutter_style: White gutters with generous breathing room.
hair_rendering: Black hair masses broken by rain strands and white rim highlights.
hatching: Thin crosshatching for stone, bold slashes for sword motion.
hatching_strategy: Thin crosshatching for stone, bold slashes for sword motion.
impact_frame_style: Cracked black frames for sudden danger.
lettering: Clean manga lettering with restrained narration boxes.
line_art: Crisp brush line art with strong silhouettes.
line_texture: Crisp ink with dry edges on rubble and rain-worn surfaces.
line_variation: Quiet panels use even contours; action panels break into fast dry-brush cuts.
line_weight: Medium-heavy foreground outlines with thin atmospheric background lines.
linework: Sharp brush contours with dry, broken texture on ruins.
name: Ruined Ink Elegy
nose_mouth_simplification: Minimal nose bridges and small mouth changes.
palette: Monochrome ink, white gutters, lantern glow reserved for highlights.
panel_border_style: Clean black borders with slightly heavier action beats.
panel_rhythm: Quiet wide panels punctuated by narrow sword-action cuts.
paneling: Cinematic quiet panels alternating with fast action slices.
prompt_style_negative: muddy grayscale, soft painterly color, unreadable lettering.
prompt_style_positive: Black-and-white ruined-city manga, lonely atmosphere, clean action silhouettes.
screentone: Soft rain tone in skies, heavier dot tone in alleys.
screentone_strategy: Rain tone in skies and heavier dot tone in alleys.
sfx_shape_language: Hand-brushed impact shapes with broken edges.
sfx_style: Hand-brushed impact kana with cracked edges.
shadow_strategy: Large black shapes against reserved lantern-white highlights.
speedline_style: Directional rain and blade lines integrated into composition.
style_intent: Original supernatural samurai manga style for a founder demo.
typography_notes: Small, careful dialogue with rectangular narration boxes.
visual_style: Black-and-white supernatural samurai manga with detailed ruins and luminous lantern contrast.
